Unnamed: 6: Notes
This field is a combination of boro, block, lot, easement, and sub-ident (only record type 3 properties have a sub-ident).

1 = Manhattan
2 = Bronx 
3 = Brooklyn
4 = Queens 
5 = Staten Island

Valid Block Ranges:
Manhattan: 1 to 2255
Bronx: 2260 to 5958 
Brooklyn: 1 to 8955
Queens: 1 to 16350
Staten Island: 1 to 8050
Unique number within BORO/BLOCK

Valid Easement Codes:
Blank = No Easement
A = Air Rights
B = Non-Air Rights
E = Land Easement
F thru M = Used when property has more than one easements
N = Non-transit
P = Piers
R = Railroads
S = Street
U = US Government

Unnamed: 2: Real Estate of Utility Corporation Sub-ident
Unnamed: 6: This field is applicable only for RECTYPE = 3, i.e., sub-idents.

1 = Ordinary Real Estate
2 = Real Estate of Utility Corporation Ident
3 = Real Estate of Utility Corporation Sub-ident

Unnamed: 2: Real Estate of Utility Corporation Ident
Unnamed: 6: This field is applicable only for RECTYPE = 2 or 3 records.

Unnamed: 2: Real Estate of Utility Corporation Sub-ident
Unnamed: 6: This field is applicable only for RECTYPE = 3, i.e., sub-idents.

This field identifies the type of Real Estate of Utility Corporation parcel.
1 = Special Franchise
3 = Power/Gas
5 = Communications
7 = Railroad

Valid Section Volume Codes:
Manhattan: 1 - 1 to 8 - 04
Bronx: 9 - 1 to 19 - 06
Brooklyn: 1 - 1 to 26 - 05
Queens: 1 - 1 to 63 - 03
Staten Island: 1 - 1 to 32 - 03

Field values are as follows:
0 = Starting value for the new Assessment Year (only the prior year fields should have values)
1 = Tentative Roll has been published (Prior Year and Tentative fields have values)
2 = Change by Notice Period has ended (Prior Year, Tentative, and CBN fields have values)
3 = Final Roll has been published (Prior Year, Tentative, CBN, and final fields have values)
4 = A Remission has been entered for this property; see Cur% columns for new values
Only 1 and 3 are displayed to the public.
